title: Is Unstructured Data The Key To Successful AI Deployments?
summary: The discussion argues that unstructured data is critical for successful enterprise AI deployments, particularly for agentic systems. Hyland, Erie Insurance, and others are highlighted as examples of organizations leveraging unstructured data to improve AI pilot outcomes and provide business impact.
writeup: This discussion makes the case that unstructured data is central to successful enterprise AI deployments, especially for agentic systems. It matters because organizations running AI pilots are looking for what drives business impact rather than stalled experiments. The takeaways: unstructured data is positioned as the key input for agentic AI, and Hyland, Erie Insurance, and other organizations are cited as examples of leveraging it to improve pilot outcomes.
